hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】由于债券收益率上升、通胀担忧扰乱市场，比特币跌破 79,000 美元；【FINANCE】美联储理事米兰递交辞呈，支持沃什出任新任主席；【FINANCE】斯蒂芬·米兰退出美联储。他如何为凯文·沃什奠定了基础。。

items.title: Bitcoin tumbles below $79,000 as rising bond yields, inflation worries rattle markets
items.summary: Stocks, gold and crypto slide while crude oil tops $100 and traders rapidly reprice Fed expectations for rate hikes.
items.title_zh: 由于债券收益率上升、通胀担忧扰乱市场，比特币跌破 79,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 股市、黄金和加密货币下跌，而原油价格突破 100 美元，交易员迅速重新定价美联储加息的预期。

items.title: Fed Governor Miran submits resignation, throws support behind Warsh as new chair
items.summary: Miran served as a contrarian voice on the rate-setting Federal Open Market Committee.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米兰递交辞呈，支持沃什出任新任主席
items.summary_zh: 米兰在制定利率的联邦公开市场委员会中担任逆向声音。

items.title: Stephen Miran exits the Fed. How he set the stage for Kevin Warsh.
items.summary: The outgoing Fed governor shares big ideas with the incoming chair.
items.title_zh: 斯蒂芬·米兰退出美联储。他如何为凯文·沃什奠定了基础。
items.summary_zh: 即将卸任的美联储理事与即将上任的主席分享了重要想法。

items.title: Enter the Killer Robots: The Ukrainian Forging the Future of Warfare
items.summary: Mykhailo Fedorov, Ukraine’s 35-year-old defense minister, sees futuristic military technology as crucial to his country’s survival.
items.title_zh: 输入杀手机器人：乌克兰人打造战争的未来
items.summary_zh: 35 岁的乌克兰国防部长米哈伊洛·费多罗夫 (Mykhailo Fedorov) 认为未来军事技术对其国家的生存至关重要。

items.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
items.summary: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.
items.title_zh: Sea 对 Codex 代理软件开发未来的看法
items.summary_zh: Sea Limited 的 CPO 解释了该公司为何在工程团队中部署 Codex 以加速亚洲 AI 原生软件的开发。

items.title: Strategy to repurchase $1.5 billion of 2029 convertible bonds using cash or bitcoin sales
items.summary: Led by Michael Saylor, the company aims to retire half of its outstanding 0% 2029 converts as it restructures liabilities tied to its bitcoin treasury strategy.
items.title_zh: 使用现金或比特币销售回购 15 亿美元 2029 年可转换债券的策略
items.summary_zh: 在迈克尔·塞勒 (Michael Saylor) 的带领下，该公司计划在重组与其比特币金库策略相关的负债时，退出 2029 年未偿还的 0% 转换者的一半。

items.title: 21Shares’ Hyperliquid ETF posts ‘best day’ inflows of $5 million as Coinbase becomes treasury deployer
items.summary: The newly-launched ETF “had its best day yet" on Thursday with $8.1 million trading volume and net inflows of roughly $4.9 million.
items.title_zh: 随着 Coinbase 成为资金部署者，21Shares 的 Hyperliquid ETF 迎来了 500 万美元的“最佳日”流入
items.summary_zh: 周四，这只新推出的 ETF 迎来了“迄今为止最好的一天”，交易量为 810 万美元，净流入约为 490 万美元。

items.title: Strategy to retire $1.5 billion in convertible notes at a discount, may sell bitcoin to fund buyback
items.summary: Strategy is buying back $1.5 billion of its 2029 convertible notes for $1.38 billion, potentially selling bitcoin to fund the deal.
items.title_zh: 以折扣价收回 15 亿美元可转换票据的策略，可能会出售比特币以资助回购
items.summary_zh: Strategy 将以 13.8 亿美元的价格回购 15 亿美元的 2029 年可转换票据，并可能出售比特币来为交易提供资金。

items.title: IREN closes $3 billion convertible notes offering as Bitcoin miner’s AI infrastructure push accelerates
items.summary: IREN closed $3 billion in convertible notes at a 1% coupon due 2033 to fund AI cloud expansion following its Nvidia and Microsoft deals.
items.title_zh: 随着比特币矿商人工智能基础设施的加速推进，IREN 完成了 30 亿美元可转换票据发行
items.summary_zh: IREN 以 1% 的票息发行了 30 亿美元的可转换票据，票面利率为 2033 年，为英伟达和微软交易后的人工智能云扩张提供资金。

items.title: THORChain pauses trading as security researchers flag suspected $10M multi-chain exploit
items.summary: THORChain halted trading after security researchers flagged a suspected exploit spanning Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB Smart Chain and Base.
items.title_zh: THORChain 暂停交易，因为安全研究人员发现涉嫌价值 1000 万美元的多链漏洞
items.summary_zh: 在安全研究人员标记出涉及比特币、以太坊、BNB 智能链和 Base 的可疑漏洞后，THORChain 停止了交易。

items.title: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
items.summary: Learn how new ChatGPT safety updates improve context awareness in sensitive conversations, helping detect risk over time and respond more safely.
items.title_zh: 帮助 ChatGPT 更好地识别敏感对话中的上下文
items.summary_zh: 了解新的 ChatGPT 安全更新如何提高敏感对话中的上下文感知，帮助随着时间的推移检测风险并更安全地做出响应。

items.title: 'Biggest bottleneck in the AI buildup' fuels DRAM ETF to record
items.summary: The Roundhill Memory ETF (DRAM) just reached $10 billion in assets at the fastest pace ever for an exchange-traded fund according to TMX VettaFi.
items.title_zh: “人工智能发展的最大瓶颈”推动 DRAM ETF 创纪录
items.summary_zh: 根据 TMX VettaFi 的数据，Roundhill Memory ETF (DRAM) 的资产刚刚以交易所交易基金有史以来最快的速度达到 100 亿美元。

items.title: NFL wants certain trading contracts banned from prediction markets like 'first play of game,' injuries
items.summary: The letter, which was reviewed by CNBC, calls for banning certain contracts and raising the age requirements for participation on sports-related contracts.
items.title_zh: NFL 希望禁止某些交易合同进入预测市场，例如“第一场比赛”、伤病等
items.summary_zh: CNBC 审阅了这封信，呼吁禁止某些合同并提高参与体育相关合同的年龄要求。

items.title: Trump and Xi conclude 'very successful' talks but no deals confirmed
items.summary: There were plenty of choreographed ceremonies but no trade breakthroughs after the two-day visit.
items.title_zh: 特朗普和习近平结束“非常成功”的会谈，但没有确认任何协议
items.summary_zh: 两天的访问之后，双方精心设计了很多仪式，但贸易上并没有取得突破。

items.title: Prisoner swap goes ahead as Kyiv mourns 24 killed in Russian strike on flats
items.summary: Among the victims in Kyiv was 12-year-old Lyubava Yakovleva, whose father was killed during the war.
items.title_zh: 基辅哀悼在俄罗斯袭击公寓中丧生的 24 人，囚犯交换继续进行
items.summary_zh: 基辅的受害者包括 12 岁的柳巴瓦·雅科夫列娃 (Lyubava Yakovleva)，她的父亲在战争中丧生。

items.title: Boy, 15, shot dead in France as prosecutors blame drug war
items.summary: Prosecutors in Nantes say the shooting was drug-related, but the victim's aunt says he was not involved.
items.title_zh: 法国15岁男孩被枪杀，检察官指责毒品战争
items.summary_zh: 南特检察官称枪击事件与毒品有关，但受害者的阿姨表示他与案件无关。

items.title: Trump’s ‘Learning Curve’ on China Ends With Conciliation at Summit
items.summary: The president has shifted the foundations of American policy toward China, throwing aside the adversarial approach of recent years.
items.title_zh: 特朗普对中国的“学习曲线”以峰会和解结束
items.summary_zh: 总统改变了美国对华政策的基础，抛弃了近年来的对抗方针。

items.title: How a Drug Cartel Made a Mexican State Its Tool
items.summary: Cartel insiders say that in exchange for bribes and political support they were allowed to operate in Sinaloa state with near total freedom.
items.title_zh: 贩毒集团如何利用墨西哥国家作为工具
items.summary_zh: 卡特尔内部人士表示，为了换取贿赂和政治支持，他们被允许在锡那罗亚州几乎完全自由地开展业务。

items.title: Inside the Congolese Hotel Where Trump Deported 15 U.S. Migrants
items.summary: They were shackled and sent to Kinshasa by the Trump administration. Now they face a dangerous choice: Go back to Latin America or stay in Africa.
items.title_zh: 特朗普驱逐 15 名美国移民的刚果酒店内部
items.summary_zh: 他们被特朗普政府戴上脚镣并送往金沙萨。现在他们面临一个危险的选择：返回拉丁美洲还是留在非洲。

items.title: Justice Dept. Aims to Use Terrorism Laws to Target Mexican Officials
items.summary: The Justice Department this week instructed federal prosecutors to build criminal drug cases against Mexican officials using new terrorism statutes.
items.title_zh: 司法部旨在利用恐怖主义法来针对墨西哥官员
items.summary_zh: 司法部本周指示联邦检察官利用新的恐怖主义法规对墨西哥官员提起刑事毒品案件。

items.title: CME, ICE push U.S. regulators to scrutinize Hyperliquid over manipulation risks
items.summary: CME Group and ICE have reportedly warned the CFTC and Capitol Hill officials that Hyperliquid’s decentralized perpetual futures platform could enable market manipulation and sanctions evasion.
items.title_zh: CME、ICE 敦促美国监管机构审查 Hyperliquid 的操纵风险
items.summary_zh: 据报道，芝商所和 ICE 已警告美国商品期货交易委员会和国会山官员，Hyperliquid 的去中心化永续期货平台可能会导致市场操纵和逃避制裁。

items.title: Iran war shows markets no longer sleep
items.summary: The latest conflict involving Iran has produced an unexpected proving ground for financial infrastructure, and an unlikely winner has emerged, argues Huang.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争表明市场不再沉睡
items.summary_zh: 黄认为，最近涉及伊朗的冲突为金融基础设施提供了一个意想不到的试验场，并且出现了一个不太可能的赢家。

items.title: Crypto market structure bill clears key hurdle as ethics debate looms over floor vote
items.summary: The Clarity Act cleared the Senate Banking Committee with bipartisan support, setting up a potential full Senate vote within weeks.
items.title_zh: 道德辩论笼罩​​在场投票中，加密货币市场结构法案扫清了关键障碍
items.summary_zh: 《澄清法案》在两党的支持下获得了参议院银行委员会的批准，并可能在几周内进行参议院全体投票。

items.title: Kraken parent Payward cuts 150 staff, streamlining business ahead of planned IPO
items.summary: The crypto exchange is also seeking fresh funding at a $20 billion valuation as it ramps up acquisitions and prepares for a public listing.
items.title_zh: Kraken 母公司 Payward 裁员 150 人，在计划 IPO 之前精简业务
items.summary_zh: 该加密货币交易所还在加大收购力度并准备公开上市的同时，正在以 200 亿美元的估值寻求新的资金。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: BNB is only gainer as index drops 2%
items.summary: BNB (BNB) rose 0.4% while Bitcoin (BTC) fell 1.3% from Thursday.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：BNB 是唯一上涨者，指数下跌 2%
items.summary_zh: BNB (BNB) 较周四上涨 0.4%，而比特币 (BTC) 则下跌 1.3%。

items.title: XRP gives back gains after Senate crypto bill sparks 5% rally
items.summary: XRP stayed pinned below resistance even as derivatives activity surged ahead of a key Senate vote that could formally reinforce the token’s commodity status.
items.title_zh: 参议院加密货币法案引发 5% 上涨后，XRP 回吐涨幅
items.summary_zh: 尽管衍生品活动在参议院关键投票之前激增，XRP 仍保持在阻力位以下，这可能会正式加强该代币的商品地位。

items.title: What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research
items.summary: Parameter Golf brought together 1,000+ participants and 2,000+ submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantization, and novel model design under strict constraints.
items.title_zh: 参数高尔夫教会了我们关于人工智能辅助研究的哪些知识
items.summary_zh: Parameter Golf 汇聚了 1,000 多名参与者和 2,000 多份提交材料，在严格约束下探索人工智能辅助机器学习研究、编码代理、量化和新颖模型设计。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享了 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: Five Italians Die While Scuba Diving Deep Caves in the Maldives
items.summary: The divers, including a marine scientist and her daughter, were part of a research trip and were exploring an underwater cave system when they failed to resurface.
items.title_zh: 五名意大利人在马尔代夫深洞潜水时死亡
items.summary_zh: 这些潜水员，包括一名海洋科学家和她的女儿，是一次研究旅行的一部分，当时他们正在探索水下洞穴系统，但未能重新浮出水面。

items.summary: OpenAI details its response to the TanStack “Mini Shai-Hulud” supply chain attack, outlines protections taken to secure systems and signing certificates, and explains why macOS users must update OpenAI apps by June 12, 2026. Learn what happened, what was affected, and how OpenAI

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: Bill Ackman built Microsoft stake in first quarter during sell-off, betting on AI and cloud growth
items.summary: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management has built a position in Microsoft, the billionaire hedge fund manager said Friday in a post on X.
items.title_zh: 比尔·阿克曼（Bill Ackman）在第一季度抛售期间增持了微软股份，押注人工智能和云计算增长
items.summary_zh: 亿万富翁对冲基金经理比尔·阿克曼 (Bill Ackman) 的潘兴广场资本管理公司 (Pershing Square Capital Management) 已在微软建仓，这位亿万富翁对冲基金经理周五在 X 上发帖称。

items.title: Trump-Xi summit: The 3 big takeaways from historic meeting in Beijing
items.summary: The two-day meeting wrapped up Friday, setting the tone for further U.S.-China talks this year.
items.title_zh: 特习会：北京历史性会晤的三大收获
items.summary_zh: 为期两天的会议于周五结束，为今年进一步的美中会谈定下了基调。

items.title: Trump leaves China after talks dominated by trade, oil and Taiwan
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump traveled to China this week for two days of meetings with Chinese President Xi Jinping, after a year of heightened trade tensions.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在以贸易、石油和台湾为主导的会谈后离开中国
items.summary_zh: 经过一年的贸易紧张局势加剧后，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普本周前往中国与中国国家主席习近平举行了为期两天的会晤。

items.title: UFC's Dana White urges Trump to reverse gambling tax law. His letter moved the prediction market
items.summary: In the letter, Dana White said that the cap is already starting to create problems for the gambling industry.
items.title_zh: UFC 的达纳·怀特 (Dana White) 敦促特朗普废除赌博税法。他的信感动了预测市场
items.summary_zh: 达纳怀特在信中表示，这一上限已经开始给博彩业带来问题。

items.title: Some short sellers are seeing opportunity in this tech mania. How they're spotting fake AI stocks
items.summary: Hedge fund managers said the current environment — fueled by aggressive spending on AI — is creating a fertile backdrop for bearish wagers
items.title_zh: 一些卖空者在这场科技狂热中看到了机会。他们如何识别假人工智能股票
items.summary_zh: 对冲基金经理表示，当前的环境——在人工智能方面的积极支出的推动下——正在为看跌赌注创造肥沃的背景

items.title: U.S. can hold AI talks with China because ‘we are in the lead,’ Bessent tells CNBC as nations plan safety protocol
items.summary: The U.S. Treasury secretary also said President Donald Trump would likely comment on the Taiwan issue in coming days.
items.title_zh: 贝森特告诉 CNBC，随着各国计划安全协议，美国可以与中国举行人工智能谈判，因为“我们处于领先地位”
items.summary_zh: 美国财政部长还表示，唐纳德·特朗普总统可能会在未来几天就台湾问题发表评论。

items.title: Trump says he 'made no commitment either way' to Xi on Taiwan
items.summary: Trump said Xi Jinping had asked directly if the US would defend Taiwan, and he had responded, "I don't talk about that".
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示他在台湾问题上“没有向习近平做出任何承诺”
items.summary_zh: 特朗普表示，习近平曾直接询问美国是否会保卫台湾，他回答说，“我不谈论这个”。

items.title: AI vigilante trap snares alleged paedophile ex-teacher in France
items.summary: The 66-year-old handed himself in after an influencer used AI to pose as a 14-year-old girl and broadcast their conversation online.
items.title_zh: 法国人工智能警员陷阱诱捕涉嫌恋童癖的前教师
items.summary_zh: 这名 66 岁的男子在一名有影响力的人使用人工智能冒充 14 岁女孩并在网上直播他们的对话后自首。

items.title: New York Times defends journalist after Israel threatens to sue
items.summary: Israel's prime minister says he has ordered legal action over an article which alleged Israeli security officials raped Palestinian detainees.
items.title_zh: 以色列威胁起诉后《纽约时报》为记者辩护

items.title: New outbreak of Ebola kills 65 in eastern DR Congo
items.summary: Africa's top health agency says around 246 cases have been reported.

items.title: Five Italians die during cave scuba dive in Maldives

items.title: ICE releases wife of US soldier and Afghanistan veteran from detention

items.title: CIA chief visits Cuba as energy crisis worsens
items.summary: The reported visit to Havana came after the US renewed an offer of aid to ease the effects of its oil blockade.

items.title: Aging Palestinian Leader Boosting His Son’s Political Rise, Officials Say
items.summary: Mahmoud Abbas’s years in power have been dogged by accusations of corruption. Many Palestinians yearn for fresh leadership.

items.title: Nvidia’s Future in China Remains Unclear After Trump-Xi Summit
items.summary: The standoff comes as Chinese firms increasingly turn to domestic chipmakers like Huawei, in a drive to reduce China’s dependence on Western technologies.

items.title: Large Ebola Outbreak Is Declared in Congo
items.summary: Dozens of deaths and hundreds of infections are suspected, an African agency said. Health experts were alarmed that the outbreak hadn’t been announced sooner.
items.title_zh: 刚果宣布爆发大规模埃博拉疫情
items.summary_zh: 一家非洲机构表示，疑似造成数十人死亡和数百人感染。卫生专家对疫情爆发没有及早宣布感到震惊。

items.title: German Chancellor, After Iran Spat With Trump, Reports ‘Good’ Phone Call
items.summary: The call, initiated by Friedrich Merz, came soon after he told young people, “I am a great admirer of America. My admiration is not increasing at the moment.”
items.title_zh: 德国总理在伊朗与特朗普发生口角后表示通话“很好”

items.title: Saudi Arabia is tokenizing its multi-trillion dollar economy to protect its wealth from global shocks
items.summary: The chairman of droppRWA has secured $12.5 billion in mandates to tokenized real estate and his plans are to go beyond properties to bring trillions of dollars onchain.

items.summary_zh: droppRWA 董事长已获得 125 亿美元的代币化房地产授权，他的计划不仅限于房地产，还将数万亿美元带入链上。

items.title: Lombard joins LayerZero exodus as $4 billion in assets switch to Chainlink's bridge
items.summary: The shift comes after the Kelp DAO exploit drained $292 million from its LayerZero-powered bridge, increasing concerns over the security of cross-chain infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 随着 40 亿美元资产转移到 Chainlink 桥上，Lombard 也加入了 LayerZero 的大逃亡行列
items.summary_zh: 这一转变是在 Kelp DAO 漏洞从其 LayerZero 驱动的桥上损失了 2.92 亿美元之后发生的，这增加了人们对跨链基础设施安全性的担忧。

items.title: Hyperliquid Policy Center argues onchain perps offer efficiency, transparency as ICE and CME reportedly press for CFTC oversight

items.title_zh: 据报道，ICE 和 CME 敦促 CFTC 进行监督，超流动性政策中心认为链上永续机构提供了效率和透明度
items.summary_zh: 彭博社报道称，ICE 和 CME 正在敦促 Hyperliquid 在 CFTC 注册，引发了对市场稳定性的担忧。

items.summary_zh: OpenSea 的 Adam Hollander 认为人工智能的进步使人们更容易创建创新的代币化资产。

items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
